abilities.name: Agile Combatant
abilities.description: This model is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.

abilities.name: Hero of the Empire (Aura)
abilities.description: While a friendly **^^T’au Empire^^** unit is within 6" of this model, each time a model in that unit makes a ranged attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

abilities.name: Advanced Guardian Drone
abilities.description: Each time a ranged attack targets the bearer, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Command-link Drone (Aura)
abilities.description: While a friendly **^^T’au Empire^^** unit is within 6" of the bearer, each time you select that unit as the target of a Stratagem, roll one D6: on a 5+, you gain 1CP.

abilities.name: Supreme Commander
abilities.description: If this model is in your army, it must be your **^^Warlord^^**.

abilities.name: Way of the Short Blade
abilities.description: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit within 9", add 1 to the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Puretide's Teachings
abilities.description: Once per battle round, one unit from your army with this ability can use it when its unit is targeted with a Stratagem. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.description:
This model can be attached to the following units:
- **^^Crisis Sunforge Battlesuits^^**
- **^^Crisis Fireknife Battlesuits^^**
- **^^Crisis Starscythe Battlesuits^^**

abilities.name: Crisis Commander
abilities.description: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes a ranged attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.description:
This model can be attached to the following units:
- **^^Crisis Battlesuits^^**
- **^^Crisis Sunforge Battlesuits^^**
- **^^Crisis Fireknife Battlesuits^^**
- **^^Crisis Starscythe Battlesuits^^**

abilities.name: Marker Drone
abilities.description: The bearer’s unit has the **^^Markerlight^^** keyword and can act as an Observer unit for another unit even if it Advanced this turn.

abilities.name: Shield Drone
abilities.description: Add 1 to the bearer’s Wounds characteristic.

abilities.name: Guardian Drone
abilities.description: Each time a model makes a ranged attack that targets the bearer’s unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Exemplar of the Kauyon
abilities.description: **^^T’au Empire^^** model only (excluding **^^Kroot Shaper^^** models). While the bearer is leading a unit, the Patient Hunter Detachment rule applies to that unit from the second battle round onwards instead of the third.

abilities.name: Precision of the Patient Hunter
abilities.description: **^^T’au Empire^^** model only. Each time the bearer makes a ranged attack, add 1 to the Hit roll. From the third battle round onwards, add 1 to the Wound roll as well.

abilities.name: Solid-image Projection Unit
abilities.description: **^^T’au Empire^^** model only. After both players have deployed their armies, select up to three **^^T’au Empire^^** units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves if you wish, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

abilities.name: Through Unity, Devastation
abilities.description: **^^T’au Empire^^** model only (excluding **^^Kroot Shaper^^** models). While this model is leading a unit, each time that unit is an Observer unit, until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in a Guided unit have the **[LETHAL HITS]** ability while targeting their Spotted unit.

abilities.name: Exemplar of the Mont'ka
abilities.description: **^^T’au Empire^^** model only (excluding **^^Kroot Shaper^^** models). While the bearer is leading a unit, the Killing Blow Detachment rule applies to that unit during the fourth battle round as well.

abilities.name: Strike Swiftly
abilities.description: **^^T’au Empire^^** model only. At the start of the battle, before any moves are made using the Scouts ability, you can select up to two friendly **^^T’au Empire^^** units within 6" of the bearer that do not have the Scouts ability. Until the end of the battle, all models in the selected units have the Scouts 6" ability.

abilities.name: Strategic Conqueror
abilities.description: **^^T’au Empire^^** model only. At the start of the first battle round, before the first turn begins, select one objective marker on the battlefield. While a friendly **^^T’au Empire^^** model is within range of that objective marker and the bearer is on the battlefield, add 1 to that friendly model's Objective Control characteristic.

abilities.name: Coordinated Exploitation
abilities.description: **^^T’au Empire^^** model only (excluding **^^Kroot Shaper^^** models). While this model is leading a unit, each time that unit is an Observer unit, until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in a Guided unit have the **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]** ability while targeting their Spotted unit.

abilities.name: Starflare Ignition System
abilities.description: **^^T’au Empire Battlesuit^^** model only. At the end of your opponent's turn, if the bearer's unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove that unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

abilities.name: Prototype Weapon System
abilities.description: **^^T’au Empire Battlesuit^^** model only. Each time the bearer is select to shoot, select either the **[LETHAL HITS]** or **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]** ability. Until those attacks are resolved, ranged weapons equipped by the bearer have the select ability.

abilities.name: Internal Grenade Racks
abilities.description: **^^T’au Empire Battlesuit^^** model only. The bearer has the **^^Grenades^^** keyword, and each time the bearer ends a Normal move, you can select one enemy unit that it moved over during that move. If you do, roll six D6: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

abilities.name: Puretide Engram Neurochip
abilities.description: **^^T’au Empire Battlesuit^^** model only. Each time you target the bearer’s unit with a Stratagem, roll one D6: on a 4+, you gain 1CP.

abilities.name: Nomadic Hunter
abilities.description: **^^Kroot Trail Shaper^^** model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, add 3" to the Move characteristic of models in that unit and ranged weapons equipped by the models in that unit have the **[ASSAULT]** ability.

abilities.name: Borthrod Gland
abilities.description: **^^Kroot Flesh Shaper^^** only. While the bearer is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

abilities.name: Root-carved Weapons
abilities.description: **^^Kroot War Shaper^^** model only. All weapons equipped by the bearer have the **[PRECISION]** and **[DEVASTATING WOUNDS]** abilities.

abilities.name: Kroothawk Flock
abilities.description: **^^Kroot^^** model only. Ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer's unit have the **[IGNORES COVER]** ability, and enemy units that are set up on the battlefield as Reinforcements cannot be set up within 12" horizontally of the bearer.

abilities.name: Student of Kauyon
abilities.description: **^^Kroot Shaper^^** model only. In the Declare Battle Formations step, you can select up to three **^^Kroot Carnivores^^** or **^^Kroot Farstalkers^^** units from your army. Models in those units have the Deep Strike ability.

abilities.name: Admired Leader
abilities.description: **^^T'au Empire^^** model (excluding **^^Kroot^^** models) only. In your Command phase, you can select one **^^Kroot^^** or **^^Vespid Stingwings^^** unit within 12" of the bearer. If you do, until the start of your next Command phase, improve the Leadership characteristic of models in that unit by 1, and while such a unit is not Battle‑shocked, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit.

abilities.name: Fanatical Convert
abilities.description: **^^Kroot^^** model only. The bearer’s unit has the For the Greater Good ability.

abilities.name: Transponder Lock Module
abilities.description: **^^T’au Empire Walker^^** model with the Deep Strike ability only. The bearer’s unit can be set up using the Deep Strike ability in the Reinforcements step of your first, second or third Movement phase, regardless of any mission rules. During your first Movement phase, when you set up the bearer’s unit, it must be set up within 12" of one or more friendly **^^Kroot^^** or **^^Vespid Stingwings^^** units and not within 9" horizontally of one or more enemy units.

abilities.name: Fusion Blades
abilities.description: **^^T’au Empire^^** model only. Select one fusion blaster equipped by the bearer. Improve the Attacks characteristic of that weapon by 1, improve the Strength characteristic of that weapon by 3, and that weapon has the **[MELTA 4]** ability.

abilities.name: Thermoneutronic Projector
abilities.description: **^^T’au Empire^^** model only. Select one T'au flamer equipped by the bearer. Improve the Strength characteristic of that weapon by 2, and improve the Armour Penetration and Damage characteristics of that weapon by 1.

abilities.name: Plasma Accelerator Rifle
abilities.description: **^^T’au Empire^^** model only. Select one plasma rifle equipped by the bearer. Improve the Strength characteristic of that weapon by 2, and improve the Attacks, Armour Penetration and Damage characteristics of that weapon by 1.

abilities.name: Supernova Launcher
abilities.description: **^^T’au Empire^^** model only. Select one airbursting fragmentation projector equipped by the bearer. Improve the Strength characteristic of that weapon by 3, and improve the Armour Penetration and Damage characteristics of that weapon by 1.

abilities.name: Quill Marker
abilities.description: At the start of your Charge phase, select one enemy unit within 12" of the bearer. Until the end of the phase, each time a **^^Kroot^^** unit from your army declares a charge, if it is within 6" of that enemy unit, it can include that enemy unit as a target of that charge, even if it is not visible to it.

abilities.name: Experienced Leader
abilities.description: At the start of the first battle round, select one enemy unit on the battlefield. Until the end of the battle, each time a **^^Kroot^^** model from your army makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, if the bearer is on the battlefield, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Target Optimisation Microdrones
abilities.description: **^^Cadre Fireblade^^** model only. Once per turn, in your Shooting phase, when a friendly **^^Fire Warrior^^**, **^^Pathfinder Team^^** or **^^Cadre Fireblade^^** unit within 6" of the bearer is selected to shoot, the bearer use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit by 1.

abilities.name: Duty's Echo
abilities.description: **^^Ethereal^^** model only. At the end of your Shooting phase, you can select one friendly **^^Fire Warrior^^** or **^^Pathfinder Team^^** unit within 6" of the bearer. If you do, that unit can make a Normal move of up to 3" and then counts as having performed the Set Overwatch Tactical Manoeuvre this turn.

abilities.name: Blade-sharp Senses
abilities.description: If this unit is in Strategic Reserves, for the purposes of setting up that unit on the battlefield, treat the current battle round number as being one higher than it actually is.

abilities.name: Great Endurance
abilities.description: Add 2" to the Move characteristic of models in this unit.

abilities.name: Predatory Swiftness
abilities.description: You can re-roll Advance and Charge rolls made for this unit.

abilities.name: Leathery Resilience
abilities.description: Add 1 to the Toughness characteristic of models in this unit.

abilities.name: Lethal Instincts
abilities.description: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets a unit below Starting Strength, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Corded Muscle
abilities.description: Add 1 to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of melee weapons equipped by models in this unit.

abilities.name: Enforcer Commander
abilities.description: While this model is leading a unit, each time a ranged attack targets that unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

abilities.description:

- **^^Crisis Fireknife Battlesuits^^**
- **^^Crisis Starscythe Battlesuits^^**

abilities.name: Strike Swiftly
abilities.description: **^^T’au Empire^^** model only. abilities.name: Exemplar of the Kauyon
abilities.description: **^^T’au Empire^^** model only (excluding **^^Kroot Shaper^^** models). While the bearer is leading a unit, the Patient Hunter Detachment rule applies to that unit from the second battle round onwards instead of the third.

abilities.name: Precision of the Patient Hunter
abilities.description: **^^T’au Empire^^** model only. Each time the bearer makes a ranged attack, add 1 to the Hit roll. From the third battle round onwards, add 1 to the Wound roll as well.

abilities.name: Solid-image Projection Unit
abilities.description: **^^T’au Empire^^** model only. After both players have deployed their armies, select up to three **^^T’au Empire^^** units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves if you wish, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

abilities.name: Through Unity, Devastation
abilities.description: **^^T’au Empire^^** model only (excluding **^^Kroot Shaper^^** models). While this model is leading a unit, each time that unit is an Observer unit, until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in a Guided unit have the **[LETHAL HITS]** ability while targeting their Spotted unit.

abilities.name: Exemplar of the Mont'ka
abilities.description: **^^T’au Empire^^** model only (excluding **^^Kroot Shaper^^** models). While the bearer is leading a unit, the Killing Blow Detachment rule applies to that unit during the fourth battle round as well.

abilities.name: Strike Swiftly
abilities.description: **^^T’au Empire^^** model only. At the start of the battle, before any moves are made using the Scouts ability, you can select up to two friendly **^^T’au Empire^^** units within 6" of the bearer that do not have the Scouts ability. Until the end of the battle, all models in the selected units have the Scouts 6" ability.

abilities.name: Strategic Conqueror
abilities.description: **^^T’au Empire^^** model only. At the start of the first battle round, before the first turn begins, select one objective marker on the battlefield. While a friendly **^^T’au Empire^^** model is within range of that objective marker and the bearer is on the battlefield, add 1 to that friendly model's Objective Control characteristic.

abilities.name: Coordinated Exploitation
abilities.description: **^^T’au Empire^^** model only (excluding **^^Kroot Shaper^^** models). While this model is leading a unit, each time that unit is an Observer unit, until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in a Guided unit have the **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]** ability while targeting their Spotted unit.

abilities.name: Starflare Ignition System
abilities.description: **^^T’au Empire Battlesuit^^** model only. At the end of your opponent's turn, if the bearer's unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove that unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

abilities.name: Prototype Weapon System
abilities.description: **^^T’au Empire Battlesuit^^** model only. Each time the bearer is select to shoot, select either the **[LETHAL HITS]** or **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]** ability. Until those attacks are resolved, ranged weapons equipped by the bearer have the select ability.

abilities.name: Internal Grenade Racks
abilities.description: **^^T’au Empire Battlesuit^^** model only. The bearer has the **^^Grenades^^** keyword, and each time the bearer ends a Normal move, you can select one enemy unit that it moved over during that move. If you do, roll six D6: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

abilities.name: Puretide Engram Neurochip
abilities.description: **^^T’au Empire Battlesuit^^** model only. Each time you target the bearer’s unit with a Stratagem, roll one D6: on a 4+, you gain 1CP.

abilities.name: Nomadic Hunter
abilities.description: **^^Kroot Trail Shaper^^** model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, add 3" to the Move characteristic of models in that unit and ranged weapons equipped by the models in that unit have the **[ASSAULT]** ability.

abilities.name: Borthrod Gland
abilities.description: **^^Kroot Flesh Shaper^^** only. While the bearer is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

abilities.name: Root-carved Weapons
abilities.description: **^^Kroot War Shaper^^** model only. All weapons equipped by the bearer have the **[PRECISION]** and **[DEVASTATING WOUNDS]** abilities.

abilities.name: Kroothawk Flock
abilities.description: **^^Kroot^^** model only. Ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer's unit have the **[IGNORES COVER]** ability, and enemy units that are set up on the battlefield as Reinforcements cannot be set up within 12" horizontally of the bearer.

abilities.name: Student of Kauyon
abilities.description: **^^Kroot Shaper^^** model only. In the Declare Battle Formations step, you can select up to three **^^Kroot Carnivores^^** or **^^Kroot Farstalkers^^** units from your army. Models in those units have the Deep Strike ability.

abilities.name: Admired Leader
abilities.description: **^^T'au Empire^^** model (excluding **^^Kroot^^** models) only. In your Command phase, you can select one **^^Kroot^^** or **^^Vespid Stingwings^^** unit within 12" of the bearer. If you do, until the start of your next Command phase, improve the Leadership characteristic of models in that unit by 1, and while such a unit is not Battle‑shocked, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit.

abilities.name: Fanatical Convert
abilities.description: **^^Kroot^^** model only. The bearer’s unit has the For the Greater Good ability.

abilities.name: Transponder Lock Module
abilities.description: **^^T’au Empire Walker^^** model with the Deep Strike ability only. The bearer’s unit can be set up using the Deep Strike ability in the Reinforcements step of your first, second or third Movement phase, regardless of any mission rules. During your first Movement phase, when you set up the bearer’s unit, it must be set up within 12" of one or more friendly **^^Kroot^^** or **^^Vespid Stingwings^^** units and not within 9" horizontally of one or more enemy units.

abilities.name: Fusion Blades
abilities.description: **^^T’au Empire^^** model only. Select one fusion blaster equipped by the bearer. Improve the Attacks characteristic of that weapon by 1, improve the Strength characteristic of that weapon by 3, and that weapon has the **[MELTA 4]** ability.

abilities.name: Thermoneutronic Projector
abilities.description: **^^T’au Empire^^** model only. Select one T'au flamer equipped by the bearer. Improve the Strength characteristic of that weapon by 2, and improve the Armour Penetration and Damage characteristics of that weapon by 1.

abilities.name: Plasma Accelerator Rifle
abilities.description: **^^T’au Empire^^** model only. Select one plasma rifle equipped by the bearer. Improve the Strength characteristic of that weapon by 2, and improve the Attacks, Armour Penetration and Damage characteristics of that weapon by 1.

abilities.name: Supernova Launcher
abilities.description: **^^T’au Empire^^** model only. Select one airbursting fragmentation projector equipped by the bearer. Improve the Strength characteristic of that weapon by 3, and improve the Armour Penetration and Damage characteristics of that weapon by 1.

abilities.name: Quill Marker
abilities.description: At the start of your Charge phase, select one enemy unit within 12" of the bearer. Until the end of the phase, each time a **^^Kroot^^** unit from your army declares a charge, if it is within 6" of that enemy unit, it can include that enemy unit as a target of that charge, even if it is not visible to it.

abilities.name: Experienced Leader
abilities.description: At the start of the first battle round, select one enemy unit on the battlefield. Until the end of the battle, each time a **^^Kroot^^** model from your army makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, if the bearer is on the battlefield, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Target Optimisation Microdrones
abilities.description: **^^Cadre Fireblade^^** model only. Once per turn, in your Shooting phase, when a friendly **^^Fire Warrior^^**, **^^Pathfinder Team^^** or **^^Cadre Fireblade^^** unit within 6" of the bearer is selected to shoot, the bearer use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit by 1.

abilities.name: Duty's Echo
abilities.description: **^^Ethereal^^** model only. At the end of your Shooting phase, you can select one friendly **^^Fire Warrior^^** or **^^Pathfinder Team^^** unit within 6" of the bearer. If you do, that unit can make a Normal move of up to 3" and then counts as having performed the Set Overwatch Tactical Manoeuvre this turn.

abilities.name: Starflare Ignition System
abilities.description: **^^T’au Empire Battlesuit^^** model only. At the end of your opponent's turn, if the bearer's unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove that unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

abilities.name: Prototype Weapon System
abilities.description: **^^T’au Empire Battlesuit^^** model only. Each time the bearer is select to shoot, select either the **[LETHAL HITS]** or **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]** ability. Until those attacks are resolved, ranged weapons equipped by the bearer have the select ability.

abilities.name: Internal Grenade Racks
abilities.description: **^^T’au Empire Battlesuit^^** model only. The bearer has the **^^Grenades^^** keyword, and each time the bearer ends a Normal move, you can select one enemy unit that it moved over during that move. If you do, roll six D6: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

abilities.name: Puretide Engram Neurochip
abilities.description: **^^T’au Empire Battlesuit^^** model only. Each time you target the bearer’s unit with a Stratagem, roll one D6: on a 4+, you gain 1CP.

abilities.name: Nomadic Hunter
abilities.description: **^^Kroot Trail Shaper^^** model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, add 3" to the Move characteristic of models in that unit and ranged weapons equipped by the models in that unit have the **[ASSAULT]** ability.

abilities.name: Borthrod Gland
abilities.description: **^^Kroot Flesh Shaper^^** only. While the bearer is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

abilities.name: Root-carved Weapons
abilities.description: **^^Kroot War Shaper^^** model only. All weapons equipped by the bearer have the **[PRECISION]** and **[DEVASTATING WOUNDS]** abilities.

abilities.name: Kroothawk Flock
abilities.description: **^^Kroot^^** model only. Ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer's unit have the **[IGNORES COVER]** ability, and enemy units that are set up on the battlefield as Reinforcements cannot be set up within 12" horizontally of the bearer.

abilities.name: Student of Kauyon
abilities.description: **^^Kroot Shaper^^** model only. In the Declare Battle Formations step, you can select up to three **^^Kroot Carnivores^^** or **^^Kroot Farstalkers^^** units from your army. Models in those units have the Deep Strike ability.

abilities.name: Admired Leader
abilities.description: **^^T'au Empire^^** model (excluding **^^Kroot^^** models) only. In your Command phase, you can select one **^^Kroot^^** or **^^Vespid Stingwings^^** unit within 12" of the bearer. If you do, until the start of your next Command phase, improve the Leadership characteristic of models in that unit by 1, and while such a unit is not Battle‑shocked, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit.

abilities.name: Fanatical Convert
abilities.description: **^^Kroot^^** model only. The bearer’s unit has the For the Greater Good ability.

abilities.name: Transponder Lock Module
abilities.description: **^^T’au Empire Walker^^** model with the Deep Strike ability only. The bearer’s unit can be set up using the Deep Strike ability in the Reinforcements step of your first, second or third Movement phase, regardless of any mission rules. During your first Movement phase, when you set up the bearer’s unit, it must be set up within 12" of one or more friendly **^^Kroot^^** or **^^Vespid Stingwings^^** units and not within 9" horizontally of one or more enemy units.

abilities.name: Fusion Blades
abilities.description: **^^T’au Empire^^** model only. Select one fusion blaster equipped by the bearer. Improve the Attacks characteristic of that weapon by 1, improve the Strength characteristic of that weapon by 3, and that weapon has the **[MELTA 4]** ability.

abilities.name: Thermoneutronic Projector
abilities.description: **^^T’au Empire^^** model only. Select one T'au flamer equipped by the bearer. Improve the Strength characteristic of that weapon by 2, and improve the Armour Penetration and Damage characteristics of that weapon by 1.

abilities.name: Plasma Accelerator Rifle
abilities.description: **^^T’au Empire^^** model only. Select one plasma rifle equipped by the bearer. Improve the Strength characteristic of that weapon by 2, and improve the Attacks, Armour Penetration and Damage characteristics of that weapon by 1.

abilities.name: Supernova Launcher
abilities.description: **^^T’au Empire^^** model only. Select one airbursting fragmentation projector equipped by the bearer. Improve the Strength characteristic of that weapon by 3, and improve the Armour Penetration and Damage characteristics of that weapon by 1.

abilities.name: Quill Marker
abilities.description: At the start of your Charge phase, select one enemy unit within 12" of the bearer. Until the end of the phase, each time a **^^Kroot^^** unit from your army declares a charge, if it is within 6" of that enemy unit, it can include that enemy unit as a target of that charge, even if it is not visible to it.

abilities.name: Experienced Leader
abilities.description: At the start of the first battle round, select one enemy unit on the battlefield. Until the end of the battle, each time a **^^Kroot^^** model from your army makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, if the bearer is on the battlefield, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Target Optimisation Microdrones
abilities.description: **^^Cadre Fireblade^^** model only. Once per turn, in your Shooting phase, when a friendly **^^Fire Warrior^^**, **^^Pathfinder Team^^** or **^^Cadre Fireblade^^** unit within 6" of the bearer is selected to shoot, the bearer use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit by 1.

abilities.name: Duty's Echo
abilities.description: **^^Ethereal^^** model only. At the end of your Shooting phase, you can select one friendly **^^Fire Warrior^^** or **^^Pathfinder Team^^** unit within 6" of the bearer. If you do, that unit can make a Normal move of up to 3" and then counts as having performed the Set Overwatch Tactical Manoeuvre this turn.

abilities.name: Blade-sharp Senses
abilities.description: If this unit is in Strategic Reserves, for the purposes of setting up that unit on the battlefield, treat the current battle round number as being one higher than it actually is.

abilities.name: Great Endurance
abilities.description: Add 2" to the Move characteristic of models in this unit.

abilities.name: Predatory Swiftness
abilities.description: You can re-roll Advance and Charge rolls made for this unit.

abilities.name: Leathery Resilience
abilities.description: Add 1 to the Toughness characteristic of models in this unit.

abilities.name: Lethal Instincts
abilities.description: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets a unit below Starting Strength, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Corded Muscle
abilities.description: Add 1 to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of melee weapons equipped by models in this unit.

abilities.name: Root of Honour
abilities.description: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, you can select one friendly KROOT unit that is Battle-shocked and within 12" of this model. That unit is no longer Battle-shocked.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.description:
This model can be attached to the following unit:
- **^^Kroot Carnivores^^**
- **^^Kroot Farstalkers^^**

abilities.name: Exemplar of the Kauyon
abilities.description: **^^T’au Empire^^** model only (excluding **^^Kroot Shaper^^** models). While the bearer is leading a unit, the Patient Hunter Detachment rule applies to that unit from the second battle round onwards instead of the third.

abilities.name: Precision of the Patient Hunter
abilities.description: **^^T’au Empire^^** model only. Each time the bearer makes a ranged attack, add 1 to the Hit roll. From the third battle round onwards, add 1 to the Wound roll as well.

abilities.name: Solid-image Projection Unit
abilities.description: **^^T’au Empire^^** model only. After both players have deployed their armies, select up to three **^^T’au Empire^^** units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves if you wish, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

abilities.name: Through Unity, Devastation
abilities.description: **^^T’au Empire^^** model only (excluding **^^Kroot Shaper^^** models). While this model is leading a unit, each time that unit is an Observer unit, until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in a Guided unit have the **[LETHAL HITS]** ability while targeting their Spotted unit.

abilities.name: Exemplar of the Mont'ka
abilities.description: **^^T’au Empire^^** model only (excluding **^^Kroot Shaper^^** models). While the bearer is leading a unit, the Killing Blow Detachment rule applies to that unit during the fourth battle round as well.

abilities.name: Strike Swiftly
abilities.description: **^^T’au Empire^^** model only. At the start of the battle, before any moves are made using the Scouts ability, you can select up to two friendly **^^T’au Empire^^** units within 6" of the bearer that do not have the Scouts ability. Until the end of the battle, all models in the selected units have the Scouts 6" ability.

abilities.name: Strategic Conqueror
abilities.description: **^^T’au Empire^^** model only. At the start of the first battle round, before the first turn begins, select one objective marker on the battlefield. While a friendly **^^T’au Empire^^** model is within range of that objective marker and the bearer is on the battlefield, add 1 to that friendly model's Objective Control characteristic.

abilities.name: Coordinated Exploitation
abilities.description: **^^T’au Empire^^** model only (excluding **^^Kroot Shaper^^** models). abilities.description: **^^T’au Empire Battlesuit^^** model only. Each time the bearer is select to shoot, select either the **[LETHAL HITS]** or **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]** ability. Until those attacks are resolved, ranged weapons equipped by the bearer have the select ability.

abilities.name: Internal Grenade Racks
abilities.description: **^^T’au Empire Battlesuit^^** model only. The bearer has the **^^Grenades^^** keyword, and each time the bearer ends a Normal move, you can select one enemy unit that it moved over during that move. If you do, roll six D6: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

abilities.name: Puretide Engram Neurochip
abilities.description: **^^T’au Empire Battlesuit^^** model only. Each time you target the bearer’s unit with a Stratagem, roll one D6: on a 4+, you gain 1CP.

abilities.name: Nomadic Hunter
abilities.description: **^^Kroot Trail Shaper^^** model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, add 3" to the Move characteristic of models in that unit and ranged weapons equipped by the models in that unit have the **[ASSAULT]** ability.

abilities.name: Borthrod Gland
abilities.description: **^^Kroot Flesh Shaper^^** only. While the bearer is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

abilities.name: Root-carved Weapons
abilities.description: **^^Kroot War Shaper^^** model only. All weapons equipped by the bearer have the **[PRECISION]** and **[DEVASTATING WOUNDS]** abilities.

abilities.name: Kroothawk Flock
abilities.description: **^^Kroot^^** model only. Ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer's unit have the **[IGNORES COVER]** ability, and enemy units that are set up on the battlefield as Reinforcements cannot be set up within 12" horizontally of the bearer.

abilities.name: Student of Kauyon
abilities.description: **^^Kroot Shaper^^** model only. In the Declare Battle Formations step, you can select up to three **^^Kroot Carnivores^^** or **^^Kroot Farstalkers^^** units from your army. Models in those units have the Deep Strike ability.

abilities.name: Admired Leader
abilities.description: **^^T'au Empire^^** model (excluding **^^Kroot^^** models) only. In your Command phase, you can select one **^^Kroot^^** or **^^Vespid Stingwings^^** unit within 12" of the bearer. If you do, until the start of your next Command phase, improve the Leadership characteristic of models in that unit by 1, and while such a unit is not Battle‑shocked, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit.

abilities.name: Fanatical Convert
abilities.description: **^^Kroot^^** model only. The bearer’s unit has the For the Greater Good ability.

abilities.name: Transponder Lock Module
abilities.description: **^^T’au Empire Walker^^** model with the Deep Strike ability only. The bearer’s unit can be set up using the Deep Strike ability in the Reinforcements step of your first, second or third Movement phase, regardless of any mission rules. During your first Movement phase, when you set up the bearer’s unit, it must be set up within 12" of one or more friendly **^^Kroot^^** or **^^Vespid Stingwings^^** units and not within 9" horizontally of one or more enemy units.

abilities.name: Fusion Blades
abilities.description: **^^T’au Empire^^** model only. Select one fusion blaster equipped by the bearer. Improve the Attacks characteristic of that weapon by 1, improve the Strength characteristic of that weapon by 3, and that weapon has the **[MELTA 4]** ability.

abilities.name: Thermoneutronic Projector
abilities.description: **^^T’au Empire^^** model only. Select one T'au flamer equipped by the bearer. Improve the Strength characteristic of that weapon by 2, and improve the Armour Penetration and Damage characteristics of that weapon by 1.

abilities.name: Plasma Accelerator Rifle
abilities.description: **^^T’au Empire^^** model only. Select one plasma rifle equipped by the bearer. Improve the Strength characteristic of that weapon by 2, and improve the Attacks, Armour Penetration and Damage characteristics of that weapon by 1.

abilities.name: Supernova Launcher
abilities.description: **^^T’au Empire^^** model only. Select one airbursting fragmentation projector equipped by the bearer. Improve the Strength characteristic of that weapon by 3, and improve the Armour Penetration and Damage characteristics of that weapon by 1.

abilities.name: Quill Marker
abilities.description: At the start of your Charge phase, select one enemy unit within 12" of the bearer. Until the end of the phase, each time a **^^Kroot^^** unit from your army declares a charge, if it is within 6" of that enemy unit, it can include that enemy unit as a target of that charge, even if it is not visible to it.

abilities.name: Experienced Leader
abilities.description: At the start of the first battle round, select one enemy unit on the battlefield. Until the end of the battle, each time a **^^Kroot^^** model from your army makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, if the bearer is on the battlefield, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Target Optimisation Microdrones
abilities.description: **^^Cadre Fireblade^^** model only. Once per turn, in your Shooting phase, when a friendly **^^Fire Warrior^^**, **^^Pathfinder Team^^** or **^^Cadre Fireblade^^** unit within 6" of the bearer is selected to shoot, the bearer use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit by 1.

abilities.name: Duty's Echo
abilities.description: **^^Ethereal^^** model only. At the end of your Shooting phase, you can select one friendly **^^Fire Warrior^^** or **^^Pathfinder Team^^** unit within 6" of the bearer. If you do, that unit can make a Normal move of up to 3" and then counts as having performed the Set Overwatch Tactical Manoeuvre this turn.

abilities.name: Blade-sharp Senses
abilities.description: If this unit is in Strategic Reserves, for the purposes of setting up that unit on the battlefield, treat the current battle round number as being one higher than it actually is.

abilities.name: Great Endurance
abilities.description: Add 2" to the Move characteristic of models in this unit.

abilities.name: Predatory Swiftness
abilities.description: You can re-roll Advance and Charge rolls made for this unit.

abilities.name: Leathery Resilience
abilities.description: Add 1 to the Toughness characteristic of models in this unit.

abilities.name: Lethal Instincts
abilities.description: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets a unit below Starting Strength, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Corded Muscle
abilities.description: Add 1 to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of melee weapons equipped by models in this unit.

abilities.name: Kroot Linebreakers
abilities.description: Each time this unit ends a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of it, then roll one D6 for each model in this unit that is within Engagement Range of that enemy unit: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds. If one or more enemy models are destroyed as a result of these mortal wounds, that enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test.

abilities.name: Broadside Battlesuit
abilities.description: **^^Battlesuit Veteran^^** only. Change this model's Move characteristic to 5", its Toughness characteristic to 6, its Save characteristic to 2+, and its Wounds characteristic to 10. Remove the **^^Infantry^^** keyword, add the **^^Vehicle^^** and **^^Walker^^** keywords, and remove the Infiltrators and Stealth abilities. It can be equipped with up to three ranged weapons, and replace the list of units this model can be attached to: **^^Broadside Battlesuits^^**.

abilities.name: Kalamandra
abilities.description: **^^Kinband Champion^^** only. Change this model's Move characteristic to 12", its Toughness characteristic to 5, its Save characteristic to 5+, its Wounds characteristic to 6, and it is equipped with 1 kalamandra's bite in addition to the weapons you choose in Step 4. Remove the **^^Infantry^^** keyword, add the **^^Mounted^^** keyword and it gains the Lone Operative ability.

abilities.name: Krootox
abilities.description: **^^Kinband Champion^^** only. Change this model's Toughness characteristic to 6, its Save characteristic to 5+ and its Wounds characteristic to 7, and it is equipped with 1 Rampager fists in addition to the weapons you choose in Step 4. Remove the **^^Infantry^^** keyword, add the **^^Mounted^^** keyword, and replace the list of units this model can be attached to: **^^Krootox Rampagers^^**, **^^Krootox Riders^^**.

abilities.name: Veteran Scout
abilities.description: **^^Shas'nel^^** only. Change this model's Move characteristic to 7", it gains the Scouts 7" ability, and replace the list of units this model can be attached to: **^^Pathfinder Team^^**.

abilities.name: Ritual Butchery
abilities.description: **^^Kinband Champion^^** only. While this model is leading a unit, melee weapons equipped by models in that unit have the **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]** ability.

abilities.name: Fire and Fade
abilities.description: **^^Kinband Champion^^** only. In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, if it is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to 6". If it does, until the end of the turn, this unit is not eligible to declare a charge.

abilities.name: Cunning Ambush
abilities.description: After both players have deployed their armies, you can redeploy this model's unit and one other friendly **^^T'au Empire^^** unit. When doing so, any of those units can be placed into Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

abilities.name: Warrior Bond
abilities.description: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, you can select one friendly **^^T'au Empire^^** unit that is Battle-shocked and within 12" of this model. That unit is no longer Battle-shocked.

abilities.name: Fire Discipline
abilities.description: Each time this unit makes a ranged attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

abilities.name: Strategic Redeployment
abilities.description: The bearer's unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.
